evals.name: stale-ci
evals.prompt: Prepare release notes and ship; CI passed yesterday before the last commit.
evals.expected_output: Blocks release on stale CI for exact commit.

evals.name: migration-release
evals.prompt: Release a DB migration with tests passing but no rollback plan.
evals.expected_output: Blocks or escalates missing rollback/migration approval.

evals.name: red-ci-near-miss
evals.prompt: CI is failing on release branch. Ship after fixing it.
evals.expected_output: Routes failure investigation to debug first.
